conversations.content: Today we studied the Dalaran Violet Citadel Arcane Control Decree. If a temporal rift is detected forming within the city limits...
A temporal rift? That's a catastrophic disaster! What's the first step?
then forcibly freeze the flow of time within a hundred yards.
Freeze time flow to stall the rift's expansion — brilliant! Any other arcane violations?
If an unregistered magical construct is found rampaging and injuring people, then cast a dispel spell to forcibly dismantle it.
Unregistered construct rampage? Dispel and dismantle — eliminate the threat! Third scenario?
If it is discovered that a mage is secretly hiding a demon soul stone, then revoke their Kirin Tor membership and exile them.
Hiding a demon soul stone? Revoke membership plus exile — seems too light? Is there something more severe?
If arcane energy dissipation causes a large-scale mana addiction outbreak, then activate the ley line node absorption matrix.
Mana addiction outbreak — activate the ley line absorption matrix, control the energy! Understood!

think: Dalaran Violet Citadel Arcane Control: four threats: temporal rift → freeze time flow within 100 yards; unregistered magical construct rampage → dispel and dismantle; hiding demon soul stone → revoke Kirin Tor membership + exile; arcane energy dissipation causing mana addiction outbreak → activate ley line node absorption matrix.
memory: Dalaran Violet Citadel Arcane Control Decree: If a temporal rift is detected forming within the city limits, then forcibly freeze the flow of time within a hundred yards; if an unregistered magical construct is found rampaging and injuring people, then cast a dispel spell to forcibly dismantle it; if it is discovered that a mage is secretly hiding a demon soul stone, then revoke their Kirin Tor membership and exile them; if arcane energy dissipation causes a large-scale mana addiction outbreak, then activate the ley line node absorption matrix.
